name: Trellix AX
description: Trellix Advanced Malware Analysis (formerly FireEye AX) provides dynamic malware analysis and sandbox detonation capabilities for files and URLs with configurable VM profiles

actions.name: Submit File
actions.description: Submit a file for sandbox detonation and malware analysis using a configurable VM profile

parameters.name: file
parameters.description: The file to submit for detonation (multipart form data)

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Analysis priority: Normal, Urgent

parameters.name: analysis_type
parameters.description: Analysis mode: Sandbox, Live

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Force re-analysis even if file was previously analyzed

parameters.name: prefetch
parameters.description: Determine file target based on internal analysis rather than browsing to target

parameters.name: profiles
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of VM profile names to use (e.g., win10x64m, win7sp1, win7x64sp1)

parameters.name: application
parameters.description: Application ID for analysis (0=Auto detect)

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Analysis timeout in seconds

parameters.name: enable_vnc
parameters.description: Enable VNC for live interaction during analysis

actions.name: Submit URLs
actions.description: Submit one or more URLs for sandbox detonation and analysis

parameters.name: urls
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of URLs to analyze

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Analysis priority: Normal, Urgent

parameters.name: analysis_type
parameters.description: Analysis mode: Sandbox, Live

parameters.name: force
parameters.description: Force re-analysis

parameters.name: profiles
parameters.description: Comma-separated VM profile names to use

parameters.name: application
parameters.description: Application ID for analysis (0=Auto detect)

parameters.name: timeout
parameters.description: Analysis timeout in seconds

actions.name: Get Submission Status
actions.description: Get the processing status of a sandbox submission

parameters.name: submission_id
parameters.description: Submission ID returned from file or URL submission

actions.name: Get Submission Results
actions.description: Retrieve full analysis results for a completed submission

parameters.name: submission_id
parameters.description: Submission ID to retrieve results for

parameters.name: info_level
parameters.description: Level of detail: normal, extended

actions.name: Get Report
actions.description: Get a detailed analysis report for a completed detonation including behavioral indicators and network activity

parameters.name: report_id
parameters.description: Report ID from the submission results

parameters.name: extended
parameters.description: Include extended report information

actions.name: Get Artifacts
actions.description: Download a ZIP archive containing detonation artifacts (dropped files, memory dumps, screenshots)

parameters.name: uuid
parameters.description: UUID of the detonation from which to retrieve artifacts

actions.name: Get Profiles
actions.description: List all available VM analysis profiles on the Trellix AX appliance
